metadata.description: Agent Skills for capturing and surfacing team decisions with Jupi — search, log, and submit decisions from inside Claude Code, Cowork, and Cursor.

plugins.name: jupi-skills
plugins.description: Decision skills backed by the Jupi MCP: search-decisions (find prior decisions), log-decision (record a settled call), submit-decision (hand an open call to a decider).

plugins.name: jupi
plugins.description: Proactive decision engine: maintains context on you and your work, turns incoming signals into ready-to-post Jupi decisions (each option carrying an executable action), and runs as daily local routines. Includes /setup onboarding.
